panels.title: Current Slot
panels.description: Latest slot processed by the validator

panels.title: Root Slot
panels.description: Latest finalized (rooted) slot

panels.title: Slot Lag
panels.description: Difference between current slot and root slot. High lag indicates finalization delay.

panels.title: Gossip Peers
panels.description: Number of connected gossip peers

panels.title: Mempool Size
panels.description: Current number of transactions in the mempool

panels.title: Total Supply (NUSA)
panels.description: Total token supply in NUSA (lamports / 1e9)

panels.title: WS Connections
panels.description: Active WebSocket connections to the RPC server

panels.title: Consecutive Skips
panels.description: Number of consecutive slots this validator has skipped as leader

panels.title: Blocks Produced / s
panels.description: Rate of blocks produced by this validator

panels.title: Block Time (ms) — p50 / p95 / p99
panels.description: Block production time histogram quantiles. Target: < 400ms slot time.

panels.title: Transactions / Slot
panels.description: Number of transactions included in each produced slot

panels.title: Skip Rate
panels.description: Rate of leader slot skips and skip ratio over 5m window

panels.title: PoH Hash Rate
panels.description: Rate of SHA3 hash iterations in the Proof of History chain

panels.title: PoH Records / Ticks / Slots
panels.description: Rate of PoH records, ticks, and slot completions

panels.title: Tower Votes & Roots
panels.description: Rate of Tower BFT vote processing and root advancement

panels.title: Fork Tree & Commitment
panels.description: Fork choice tree state and commitment levels

panels.title: GPU Verification & Leader Schedule
panels.description: GPU PoH verification activity and leader schedule computations

panels.title: Bank Frozen & Rewards
panels.description: Bank slot freezing and reward distribution metrics

panels.title: Blocks Produced vs Replayed
panels.description: Rate of block production, replay, and vote processing

panels.title: Leader Slots vs Skips
panels.description: Leader slot assignments, skips, and non-leader slots (stacked)

panels.title: Orphan Block Buffer
panels.description: Orphan block queue size and lifecycle events

panels.title: Fork Switches & Block Discards
panels.description: Fork switch events and reasons for block discards

panels.title: Root & Snapshot Management
panels.description: Root slot progression and snapshot operations

panels.title: Transaction Throughput
panels.description: Executed vs failed transactions per second (stacked, failed in red)

panels.title: Compute Units & Fees
panels.description: Compute units consumed and fees collected per second

panels.title: Parallel Execution
panels.description: Parallel executor metrics: batches, transactions, compute, and fees

panels.title: VM Executions
panels.description: Virtual machine execution rate, compute consumed, and log messages

panels.title: Slot-Level Runtime
panels.description: Per-slot runtime transaction and compute totals

panels.title: Gossip Messages Received / s
panels.description: Total gossip protocol messages received per second

panels.title: Push vs Pull Traffic
panels.description: Gossip push messages, pull requests/responses sent and received

panels.title: CRDS Operations
panels.description: CRDS table inserts, purges, and pull values received

panels.title: Gossip Errors
panels.description: All gossip protocol error counters: invalid signatures, rate limits, prune errors

panels.title: Ping / Pong Details
panels.description: Ping/pong verification failures, expired pongs, and unsolicited pongs

panels.title: Shreds Created vs Received
panels.description: Rate of shreds created by shredder vs received from network

panels.title: Broadcast & Retransmit
panels.description: Turbine broadcast, retransmit, and block assembly rates

panels.title: Shred Errors
panels.description: Rejected shreds: unknown leader, invalid signatures, max index, duplicate, slot evictions

panels.title: Repair Service
panels.description: Repair requests, responses, shreds received, and cache hit/miss rates

panels.title: Shreds Per Broadcast — p50 / p95 / p99
panels.description: Histogram quantiles for the number of shreds per broadcast event

panels.title: TPU Transactions Received / s
panels.description: Rate of transactions received by the QUIC TPU server

panels.title: Forwarding: Local vs Remote
panels.description: Transaction forwarding: local (leader=self), remote (QUIC to leader), sent messages (stacked)

panels.title: TPU Errors & Rate Limiting
panels.description: TPU error counters: rate limiting, invalid transactions, signature failures, connection rejects, no-leader drops, forward errors

panels.title: Mempool Size
panels.description: Current mempool depth with capacity thresholds

panels.title: Insert vs Drain Rate
panels.description: Rate of transactions inserted into and drained from the mempool

panels.title: Rejections & Evictions
panels.description: Mempool rejection reasons: duplicates, account limits, full pool, evictions, expired (stacked)

panels.title: RPC Requests / s by Endpoint
panels.description: REST API request rate broken down by endpoint label (stacked)

panels.title: JSON-RPC Metrics
panels.description: JSON-RPC request rate, batch requests, and transaction submissions

panels.title: JSON-RPC Batch Size — p50 / p95
panels.description: Histogram quantiles for JSON-RPC batch request sizes

panels.title: WebSocket Activity
panels.description: WebSocket connections, upgrades, events sent, and lagged events

panels.title: RPC Submissions & Downloads
panels.description: Transaction submissions via REST, airdrops, and snapshot downloads

panels.title: Stake & Validators
panels.description: Total active stake (in NUSA) and number of staked validators

panels.title: Voting & Rewards
panels.description: Vote submission rate, gossip vote processing, and total rewards distributed

panels.title: Slashing Events
panels.description: Double vote detections, slashing penalties applied, and total lamports slashed

panels.title: State Tree
panels.description: State tree leaf counts from consensus and validator subsystems

panels.title: Owner Index Operations
panels.description: Rate of owner index updates and removals in storage
